name: Peninsula Energy Limited
analysis: PEN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 61% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.4200, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.5250 (1.26:1) — then trail it.
